     The Numbers Business Report

Bedtime Stories (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $110,101,975Details
International Box Office $111,366,960
Worldwide Box Office $221,468,935
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $52,672,649
Total $52,672,649
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An adventure comedy in which Skeeter Bronson, a hotel handyman, has his life changed forever when the bedtime stories he tells his niece and nephew start to mysteriously come true. When he tries to help his family by telling one outlandish tale after another, it's the kids' unexpected contributions that turn all of their lives upside down.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,450,296 (24.9% of total gross)
Legs:4.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,681 opening theaters/3,684 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $124,133,019

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2008 (Wide) by Walt Disney
Video Release: April 5th, 2009 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor and mild language
Running Time: 99 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Plot point: Wish Granters
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Happy Madison, Conman & Izzy
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
